info.title: Gatling Enterprise Cloud API
info.description: Documentation of the public Gatling Enterprise Cloud API. To use this API you will need to generate an API token.

get.description:
List all the API Tokens that can be seen by the API token.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on a team to see its tokens; others are omitted.
get.summary: List all the API Tokens that can be seen by the API token

post.description:
Create a new API Token.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on each target team.

delete.description:
Delete the specified API Token.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on the token's targeted teams.

put.description:
Update the details of the specified API Token.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on the token's targeted teams.
put.summary: Update the details of the specified API Token

post.description:
Regenerate the specified API Token.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on the token's targeted teams.

get.description:
Get the server information.

No permission, no authentication required.

List all the locations that can be seen by the API token.

Require at least the `Read` role on any team.
get.summary: List all the locations that can be seen by the API token

get.description:
List all the packages that can be seen by the API token.

Require at least the `Read` role on a team to see its packages; others are omitted.
get.summary: List all the packages that can be seen by the API token

post.description:
Create a new package.

Require the `Configure` role on the target team.
Require the Managed Package feature to be enabled on the organization when creating a managed package.

delete.description:
Delete the specified package.

Require the `Configure` role on the package's team.

get.description:
Get the details of the specified package.

Require the `Read` role on the package's team.
get.summary: Get the details of the specified package

put.description:
Update the details of the specified package.

Require the `Configure` role on the package's team.
put.summary: Update the details of the specified package

get.description:
List all the Runs updated since the provided timestamp (default: 24h).

Require at least the `Read` role on the run's simulation's team; others are omitted.
get.summary: List all the Runs updated since the provided timestamp (default: 24h)

get.description:
Get the details of the specified Run.

Require the `Read` role on the run's simulation's team.
get.summary: Get the details of the specified Run

put.description:
Update the details of the specified Run.

Require the `Administrate` role on the run's simulation's team.
put.summary: Update the details of the specified Run

post.description:
Stop the specified Run.

Require the `Start` role on the run's simulation's team.

get.description:
List all the Source Repositories that can be seen by the API token.

Require at least the `Read` role on a team to see its source repositories; others are omitted.
get.summary: List all the Source Repositories that can be seen by the API token

post.description:
Create a new Source Repository.

Require the `Configure` role on the target team.

delete.description:
Delete the specified Source Repository.

Require the `Configure` role on the source repository's team.

get.description:
Get the details of the specified Source Repository.

Require the `Read` role on the source repository's team.
get.summary: Get the details of the specified Source Repository

get.description:
List all the SSO Groups that can be seen by the API token.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on a team to see its SSO groups; others are omitted.
get.summary: List all the SSO Groups that can be seen by the API token

post.description:
Create a new SSO group.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on each target team.
Require the SSO Group Mapping feature to be enabled.

delete.description:
Delete the specified SSO group.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on the SSO group's targeted teams.

parameters.name: ssoGroupId
parameters.description: The ID of the SSO group mapping

schema.description: The ID of the SSO group mapping

get.description:
Get the details of the specified SSO group.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on the SSO group's teams.
get.summary: Get the details of the specified SSO group

parameters.name: ssoGroupId
parameters.description: The ID of the SSO group mapping

schema.description: The ID of the SSO group mapping

put.description:
Update the details of the specified SSO group.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on the SSO group's targeted teams.
put.summary: Update the details of the specified SSO group

parameters.name: ssoGroupId
parameters.description: The ID of the SSO group mapping

schema.description: The ID of the SSO group mapping

get.description:
List all the teams that can be seen by the API token.

Require at least the `Read` role on a team to see it; others are omitted.
get.summary: List all the teams that can be seen by the API token

post.description:
Create a new team.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level.

delete.description:
Delete the specified team.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on the team.

get.description:
Get the details of the specified team.

Require the `Read` role on the team.
get.summary: Get the details of the specified team

get.description:
Get the limits of the specified team.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level.
get.summary: Get the limits of the specified team

put.description:
Update the limits of the specified team.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level.
put.summary: Update the limits of the specified team

get.description:
List all the tests that can be seen by the API token.

Require at least the `Read` role on the team of the test's package or source repository; others are omitted.
get.summary: List all the tests that can be seen by the API token

post.description:
Create a new test.

Require the `Configure` role on the team of the referenced package or source repository.

delete.description:
Delete the specified test.

Require the `Configure` role on the team of the test's package or source repository.

get.description:
Get the details of the specified test.

Require the `Read` role on the team of the test's package or source repository.
get.summary: Get the details of the specified test

put.description:
Update the details of the specified test.

Require the `Configure` role on the team of the test's package or source repository.
put.summary: Update the details of the specified test

post.description:
Start a run for the specified test.

Require the `Start` role on the team of the test's package or source repository.
post.summary: Start a run for the specified test

get.description:
List all the users that can be seen by the API token.

Require the `Read` role at the global level or on any team.
Require the SSO Group Mapping feature to be disabled.
get.summary: List all the users that can be seen by the API token

post.description:
Create a new user.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on each target team.
Require the organization to have Custom SSO configured.
Require the SSO Group Mapping feature to be disabled.

delete.description:
Delete the specified user.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level.

get.description:
Get the details of the specified user.

Require the `Read` role at the global level or on any team.
Require the SSO Group Mapping feature to be disabled.
get.summary: Get the details of the specified user

put.description:
Update the details of the specified user.

Require the `Administrate` role at the global level or on any team.
Require the organization to have Custom SSO configured.
Require the SSO Group Mapping feature to be disabled.
put.summary: Update the details of the specified user

post.description:
Upload the binary content of the specified package (simulation JAR or bundle).

Requires the `Configure` role on the package's team.
Requires the Managed Package feature to be enabled on the organization.

name.description: This shape is deprecated since 2026.15.0: [CLD-8183] Unused, retained for compatibility

_id.description: The ID of the SSO group mapping
The ID of the SSO group mapping
The ID of the SSO group mapping

id.description: The ID of the SSO group mapping

ApiKeyAuth.name: authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: API Key authentication. Use your API token as the value.
